# Unicode & Internationalization

This document tests proper handling of various character encodings and scripts.

## Emoji & Symbols

Support for emoji: 🎉 🚀 🔧 ✅ ❌ 📝

Special characters: © ® ™ € ¥ £

## Accented Latin

- Café (French)
- Naïve (French)
- Résumé (French)
- Über (German)
- Español (Spanish)

## Asian Scripts

Chinese: 知識庫 (knowledge base)
Japanese: プログラミング (programming)
Korean: 프로그래밍 (programming)
Hindi: प्रोग्रामिंग (programming)

## Mathematical Symbols

- α + β = γ
- ∫ f(x) dx
- ∑ from i=1 to n
- ∀ x ∈ ℝ
